text:
ak03@gte.com writes:
 > [...]
 
 Why do you use 16 lines of code to fix this when all you need is to
 add p != q to the if test?
 
 (And you didn't spot the real bug, either - but it can still be fixed
 by just rewording the if test)
 
 DES
